verification.grep_near_resolution: suppression gate and cooldown block both present

logic_trace_results.case_1_watcher_running_market_not_resolv: pass - gate condition true for near_resolution + resolved_markets non-empty + market_id absent; logs HOLD and continue keeps trade open
logic_trace_results.case_2_watcher_running_market_resolved: pass - market_resolved block executes before check_exit and force-closes at resolution price
logic_trace_results.case_3_watcher_not_running: pass - resolved_markets empty dict is falsy so gate skipped and near_resolution close proceeds
logic_trace_results.case_4_stop_loss_not_suppressed: pass - reason != near_resolution so gate skipped and stop_loss closes normally
